title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 478.070 - Jurisdiction of circuit courts
text:
478.070.  Jurisdiction of circuit courts. — The circuit courts shall have original jurisdiction over all cases and matters, civil and criminal.  Such courts may issue and determine original remedial writs.
(RSMo 1939 § 2100, A. 1949 S.B. 1140, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-02-79
